arts.ttl: Newcastle captain Bruno Guimaraes hopes to make good on promise he made to fans
arts.sum: Newcastle United take on Liverpool in the Carabao Cup final at Wembley on Sunday afternoon and Magpies captain Bruno Guimaraes is dreaming of lifting the trophy

arts.ttl: Newcastle receive boost in their efforts to keep key star amid transfer rumours
arts.sum: Bruno Guimaraes will not push for a move away from Newcastle United despite interest from rivals. The Brazilian international’s future has been a massive talking point in recent weeks. While there is still over three years left on his deal at the Tyneside club, he has been linked with a move away. According to a […] The post Newcastle receive boost in their efforts to keep key star amid transfer rumours appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news update: Summer window latest as Reds 'interested' in ex-Manchester City attacker to replace Darwin Nunez
arts.sum: The agent of an ex-Manchester City attacker claims that Liverpool held interest in signing the forward last summer and refuses to rule out the possibility of a move.

arts.ttl: ‘Possibly’: Glenn Murray says £75m Liverpool player could really struggle vs Newcastle tomorrow
arts.sum: Liverpool and Newcastle face off in the Carabao Cup final on Sunday in what could be a very tight game. Paul Merson reckons this game...

arts.ttl: Report: The three centre-backs Liverpool wish to replace Van Dijk with
arts.sum: Liverpool are keeping their options open in case Virgil van Dijk leaves on a free transfer this summer, with three defenders reportedly on their radar. According to Christian Falk, the Reds are considering Nico Schlotterbeck, Marc Guehi, and Konstantinos Koulierakis as possible replacements for their captain. The Dutchman’s contract is set to expire at the […] The post Report: The three centre-backs Liverpool wish to replace Van Dijk with appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk made me realise what I did for Liverpool - my God, what an achievement
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Former Liverpool captain Jamie Redknapp chats to the ECHO to preview Sunday's Carabao Cup final against Newcastle United

arts.ttl: Liverpool star details 'amazing' Arne Slot admission before Carabao Cup final
arts.sum: CARABAO CUP FINAL: Wataru Endo has found minutes hard to come by for Liverpool this season but he has been a prominent figure throughout their League Cup campaign as he looks to help the Reds retain the trophy against Newcastle at Wembley

arts.ttl: This is no Mickey Mouse Cup - the Carabao Cup final is special for Liverpool and Newcastle
arts.sum: From milk to an energy drink, this competition has had plenty of sponsors but has never been given the kudos it deserves - that might change as an epic Wembley showdown beckons

arts.ttl: Team News: Liverpool vs. Newcastle United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's EFL Cup clash between Liverpool and Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Julian Alvarez agent confirms Liverpool transfer interest and leaves door open for summer move
arts.sum: The agent of Atletico Madrid striker Julian Alvarez has claimed Liverpool were interested in signing the player from Manchester City last year
